name: Sensory Friendly Cocoon Kids' Seat - Pillowfort™
description:
From afternoon hangs to reading a book to playing a game, this Sensory Cocoon Bean Bag from Pillowfort™ gives your kiddo a delightfully comfy spot they'll love to call their own. A soft velvet cover gives this kids' bean bag chair a cozy feel that's perfect for snuggling up in, and its machine-washable cover lends easy upkeep alongside the water-resistant liner to help keep it in great condition longer. The sensory bean bag features a cocoon silhouette that provides cradled comfort and security, complete with a snuggly, filled design lending the perfect amount of cushioned comfort. The cushion (middle) liner is sewn into the cover so, the cover, liner and fill are all washed together.

Diameter: 34 inches
Overall Height: 16 inches
